summary: Weekly email status quality improves when all comments from the selected week are aggregated (not only latest), with deterministic cleanup and English-safe fallback.
source_links: user-feedback: report must be closer to dense weekly status format and in English
details: Use all in-week comments to build status context; deduplicate points and cap size.
Strip links/Jira keys/formatting before AI rewrite so weak models focus on semantics.
When comments are non-English and AI cannot rewrite, return English fallback text.
Ensure custom output_file path still writes HTML and weekly snapshot.
